seniority.level: Senior Director (likely VP-adjacent / IC or player-coach leader)
level_signals: 10+ years of experience with director-level scope
Lead and grow a high-performing team
Hire and coach for high ownership
Comp range $270K–$350K base consistent with Senior Director at a well-funded startup

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience with director-level scope in Strategy & Operations, BizOps, post-sales operations, CX operations, delivery operations, or adjacent functions.
Demonstrated ability to diagnose ambiguous problems, drive structured workstreams, and influence senior stakeholders.
Experience scaling a post-sales, CX, or delivery organization during hypergrowth—building playbooks, operating cadences, and resourcing/capacity planning systems.
Strong executive communication and trust-building skills; ability to align cross-functional leaders and drive decisions with clarity and rigor.
Comfort operating in fast-moving, ambiguous environments where you build structure while maintaining momentum.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Direct experience partnering with Sales/GTM on deal scoping, success readiness, and pre-close operational rigor.
Background in B2B SaaS, enterprise software, or AI-adjacent companies.
Prior experience building an operations function from scratch or leading it through early scale.

scope.surface: Customer Strategy & Operations — post-sales execution, deployment operations, and delivery infrastructure for enterprise customers
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise SaaS / conversational AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Delivery health visibility and forecasting accuracy
Operational efficiency as customer base scales
core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain repeatable processes that improve deployment consistency and ongoing customer operations.
Establish operating rhythms and reporting that create visibility into delivery health, risks, and key bottlenecks.
Drive planning and resourcing practices that support predictable execution as the business scales.
Partner with GTM to improve upfront alignment on customer goals, scope, and readiness.
Lead cross-functional initiatives with Product and Engineering to unblock execution and improve outcomes.
Own issue management and escalation handling to keep delivery and customer results on track.
Manage and develop a Strategy & Operations team focused on operational excellence and scalability.
Hire and coach for high ownership and strong execution, emphasizing durable systems over one-off fixes.

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($270K–$350K base + equity)
Clear ownership scope over a well-defined function (Customer Strategy & Operations)
Well-known VC backers (a16z, Accel, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, Index Ventures) signal funding health
Named enterprise customers (Avis, Cash App, Square, Chime, Oura) signal real traction
Role has broad cross-functional influence and direct leadership mandate
red_flags: Strictly in-office with no remote option; city/location not specified in JD body, which limits candidates' ability to assess relocation needs
No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided
Hypergrowth environment with ambiguous scope may indicate significant organizational churn and shifting priorities

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title, years requirement, and comp range)
